category_sources: Official GitHub README says havener is a convenience wrapper around kubectl for Kubernetes tasks.
source_facts.description says Havener is a Swiss army knife for Kubernetes tasks.
display_name_sources: Official repository name is homeport/havener and README text uses havener.
docs_sources: No separate docs site found in source_facts; official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/homeport/havener; per instruction repo returned as null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: Official README describes Kubernetes and kubectl task workflows.
